cards.afterText:
🟥BIRDS ARE SINGING
1 BIRDS ARE SINGING
AFTER COMBAT: 🟥FLOWERS ARE...
1 FLOWERS ARE BLOOMING
AFTER COMBAT: 🟥ON DAYS LIKE...
1 ON DAYS LIKE THESE KIDS LIKE YOU
AFTER COMBAT: 🟥SHOULD BE...
1 SHOULD BE BURNING IN HELL
AFTER COMBAT: Remove this card from the game.
cards.title: It's a beautiful day outside

cards.duringText: Add the BOOST value of the top card of your opponent's discard pile to this card's value. If it is an attack or versatile card, double the BOOST value.
cards.title: Karmic Retribution

cards.immediateText: If your opponent played a card, they may BOOST it.
cards.title: The Easiest Enemy

cards.duringText: If this is your first action, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: I Never Make Promises

cards.afterText: The opposing fighter takes damage equal to the BOOST value of your opponent's card. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: Bad Time

cards.afterText:
Shuffle 2 cards in your discard pile into your deck. 
Remove this card from the game.
cards.title: Doing Things the Hard Way

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, shuffle 1 card in your discard pile, other than HERE WE GO, into your deck.
cards.title: Here We Go

cards.afterText:
Shuffle 1 card in your discard pile into your deck. 
Remove this card from the game.
cards.title: Miss

cards.afterText: Deal damage to the opposing fighter equal to the number of cards you discarded from your deck this combat.
cards.title: Strike Back

cards.immediateText: Return each card that you discard this combat to your hand, other than this card.
cards.title: Anomalous Exploit

cards.basicText:
Look at an opponent's hand and choose a card. Your opponent may discard it. If they don't, their hero takes damage equal to its BOOST value.
Remove this card from the game.
cards.title: Judgement

cards.basicText:
Place Sans in any space. Choose 1 effect and remove this card from the game:
- Gain 1 action
- End the turn
cards.title: Space-Time Shenanigans

cards.basicText:
Draw up to 3 cards. Place that many cards in your hand on top of your deck in any order.
Remove this card from the game.
cards.title: Premonition

cards.basicText:
Use the following link to pull up the image of the arted penta-attack. You can just print the image, or in TTS put the image address on a Custom Card:
https://i.imgur.com/JClMsQF.png

hero.name: Sans
hero.specialAbility: When Sans would take damage, discard the top card of your deck and reduce the damage by the discarded card’s BOOST value. Do this until Sans takes no damage. Concerning effects, Sans is considered to have taken damage.

ruleCards.content: Cards that are removed from the game cannot be brought back with effects that return cards from your discard pile.
ruleCards.title: Extra Rules

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: "No matter what, you'll just keep going. Just because you think you can. And because you can...you have to."

name: Sans
note:
Yes this is indeed the funny Skeleton deck. Sans will dodge every attack you could ever throw at him, but each time he dodges he gets closer to the point of exhaustion. Ability idea comes from my friend DumbJoke. He didn't want to make a Sans deck, so I took up the mantle, check out his other decks tho, they're great.
Go to the official RG discord server, and search for the Sans thread, there in is a custom .json which includes the arted penta-attack.
